task_description: Create NeuroX v4 (version 7.4) as a separate folder alongside existing versions. Copy neurox/ to neurox_v4/ and add three new features: (1) Platt scaling confidence calibration, (2) micro-pullback smart entry timing, (3) Sharpe-ratio-based model weights. Also create NeuroX_EA_v4.mq5, neurox_run_v4.bat, and Python_Bridge_EA_v4.mq5.

verification.summary: All v4 imports verified clean. VERSION = '7.4' confirmed. ConfidenceCalibrator correctly passes through with insufficient data and calibrates after training. EntryTimingManager correctly detects pullback/breakout/timeout conditions. EnsembleManager has sharpe_reweight() and compute_sharpe_weights() working. EA has version '7.40'. Bat file targets python_bridge_v4/. Root-level Python_Bridge_EA_v4.mq5 matches EA copy (md5sum identical). Original neurox/ folder untouched (git diff clean).

fixes_applied: Issue 1 (CRITICAL): Entry timing HOLD-cycle signal loss - signal_details stored in pending state, signal reconstructed and written to bridge on trigger
Issue 2 (DESIGN): Sharpe PnL attribution differentiated - individual model predictions stored at trade open, PnL attributed proportionally to models voting for trade direction
Issue 4 (CONFIG): Platt state file path made absolute using os.path.dirname anchored to neurox_v4 root
not_addressed: Issue 3 (unit tests): Skipped per orchestrator guidance (optional)
Issue 5 (batch script branch name): By project convention
